fallbackReason: Task subagent bun-eval parsing error; direct review per AGENTS.md guidance
summary: Feature creates a self-contained /submission-proof route with proof-pack assembly utility, component, and README integration. The page allows operators to select a company, agent, and run; then assembles manifest (agent.json), run log (agent_log.json), payment evidence, and route matrix into a downloadable proof pack. Individual artifact and full-pack downloads are supported. 16 tests cover the utility's assembly logic, partial failure isolation, and component rendering states. Route matrix matches the AppShell sidebar.

observations: Proof pack assembly uses independent try-catch per artifact so partial failures don't block other artifacts
ROUTE_MATRIX is a compile-time constant that can be validated against actual AppShell routes
The page correctly uses useActiveCompany() hook for company context
Download triggers use triggerJsonDownload from the existing erc8004/download module — good reuse
Retrieval instructions match what README describes, satisfying VAL-CROSS-006's self-contained requirement
Context loading is intentionally deferred (Load agents and runs button) to avoid expensive queries on mount

issues.description: The SubmissionProofPage test has a React act() warning for state update inside useCompanyProofContext. This is a test environment issue (async state update after render) and does not affect production behavior.
issues.recommendation: Could be silenced by wrapping the state update test with waitFor() or ignoring console.error for act() warnings in test setup.
